- Error Code 2 & Status Code 404 error is presented if the account number does not exist.  This is also true if you select that you want to close both CMS and TIM, and one of the accounts (CMS or TIM) does not exist.

- Error Code 20000 is presented when the closure works properly.  You will also want to compare that certain fields are updated in the response as confirmation of closure.  The "status" field in the data section will be a value of "C" for closed.  Account number will match from the request parameter.  Null will be the value for Balance, businessPartner, and cmsRelationship.

request.description:
What is needed for this API reqeust?

1. Client Secret: This is provided that is specific to something going on. Need more information as this could be specific to each application and not a "generic" item for all API requests.
    
2. Client ID: This is identifying the app that is making the request. From work that has been done by Parker Phair on some other items, some API requests can only come from specific applications. So, it may be requisite to make sure the authorized applications are documented.
    
3. Access Token Manager ID
    
4. Validator ID
